section.div: 49% of my body is made of movies.

section.h2: Recent coding habits (computed from last 4 commits)

ul.li: Has approximately 34.0 characters per line of code written

div.div: Kill 20 Jockeys with the shovel or pitchfork.
Kill a pouncing Hunter with a shotgun.
Kill a Tank only with damage from the original Survivors.
KILLING THEM SWIFTLY TO THIS SONG
Play the new Midnight Riders song on a jukebox.
Help porters through a MULE or terrorist area for the first time.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Find all the tarot graffiti for the job Fool on the Hill.
Complete all missions with a 100% deception score
Complete Call in Dead mission with perfect score
Complete the Call in Dead mission
Play a gamemode that isn't sandbox
